001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.NotificationMessage;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest;
011
012import java.math.BigInteger;
013import java.util.Set;
014import java.util.TreeSet;
015
016/**
017 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest}, opCode -109, size 17
018 *
019 * <br>
020 *
021 * 
022 * <table border='1'>
023 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
024 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-109</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
025 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>17</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
026 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
027 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
028 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
029 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#MOBI_API_V3_5}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
030 * </table>
031 */
032@MessageProps(
033    opCode=-109,
034    size=17,
035    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
036    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
037    request=ActiveAamBitsRequest.class,
038    minApi=KnownApiVersion.MOBI_API_V3_5
039)
040public class ActiveAamBitsResponse extends NotificationMessage {
041    private BigInteger unacknowledgedBitmask;
042    private BigInteger activeBitmask;
043    private AamType aamType;
044    private Set<MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType> unacknowledgedMalfunctions;
045    private Set<MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType> activeMalfunctions;
046
047    public ActiveAamBitsResponse() {
048        this.cargo = EMPTY;
049        this.unacknowledgedBitmask = BigInteger.ZERO;
050        this.activeBitmask = BigInteger.ZERO;
051        this.aamType = AamType.UNKNOWN;
052        this.unacknowledgedMalfunctions = new TreeSet<>();
053        this.activeMalfunctions = new TreeSet<>();
054    }
055
056    public ActiveAamBitsResponse(BigInteger unacknowledgedBitmask, BigInteger activeBitmask, AamType aamType) {
057        this.cargo = buildCargo(unacknowledgedBitmask, activeBitmask, aamType);
058        parse(cargo);
059    }
060
061    public ActiveAamBitsResponse(byte[] raw) {
062        this.cargo = raw;
063        parse(raw);
064    }
065
066    /**
067     * <table border="1">
068     * <caption>Parsed fields for ActiveAamBitsResponse:</caption>
069     * <tr><td><code>unacknowledgedBitmask</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint64(raw, 0)</code></td></tr>
070     * <tr><td><code>activeBitmask</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint64(raw, 8)</code></td></tr>
071     * <tr><td><code>aamType</code></td><td><code>AamType.fromId(raw[16] &amp; 0xFF)</code></td></tr>
072     * <tr><td><code>unacknowledgedMalfunctions</code></td><td><code>MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType.fromBitmask(this.unacknowledgedBitmask)</code></td></tr>
073     * <tr><td><code>activeMalfunctions</code></td><td><code>MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType.fromBitmask(this.activeBitmask)</code></td></tr>
074     * </table>
075     */
076    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
077        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
078        this.cargo = raw;
079        this.unacknowledgedBitmask = Bytes.readUint64(raw, 0);
080        this.activeBitmask = Bytes.readUint64(raw, 8);
081        this.aamType = AamType.fromId(raw[16] & 0xFF);
082
083        if (this.aamType == AamType.MALFUNCTION) {
084            this.unacknowledgedMalfunctions = MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType.fromBitmask(this.unacknowledgedBitmask);
085            this.activeMalfunctions = MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType.fromBitmask(this.activeBitmask);
086        } else {
087            this.unacknowledgedMalfunctions = new TreeSet<>();
088            this.activeMalfunctions = new TreeSet<>();
089        }
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * <table border="1">
094     * <caption>Byte layout for ActiveAamBitsResponse.buildCargo(...):</caption>
095     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
096     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
097     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
098     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 4]</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 5]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 6]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()) [byte 7]</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
106     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
107     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
108     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 4]</code></td></tr>
109     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 5]</code></td></tr>
110     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 6]</code></td></tr>
111     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()) [byte 7]</code></td></tr>
112     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>(byte) aamType.id()</code></td></tr>
113     * </table>
114     */
115    public static byte[] buildCargo(BigInteger unacknowledgedBitmask, BigInteger activeBitmask, AamType aamType) {
116        return Bytes.combine(
117            Bytes.toUint64(unacknowledgedBitmask.longValue()),
118            Bytes.toUint64(activeBitmask.longValue()),
119            new byte[]{(byte) aamType.id()}
120        );
121    }
122
123    public BigInteger getUnacknowledgedBitmask() {
124        return unacknowledgedBitmask;
125    }
126
127    public BigInteger getActiveBitmask() {
128        return activeBitmask;
129    }
130
131    public AamType getAamType() {
132        return aamType;
133    }
134
135    public boolean hasActiveBit(int bit) {
136        return bit >= 0 && bit < 64 && activeBitmask != null && activeBitmask.testBit(bit);
137    }
138
139    public boolean hasUnacknowledgedBit(int bit) {
140        return bit >= 0 && bit < 64 && unacknowledgedBitmask != null && unacknowledgedBitmask.testBit(bit);
141    }
142
143    public Set<MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType> getUnacknowledgedMalfunctions() {
144        return unacknowledgedMalfunctions;
145    }
146
147    public Set<MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.MalfunctionType> getActiveMalfunctions() {
148        return activeMalfunctions;
149    }
150
151    @Override
152    public int size() {
153        return activeBitmask == null ? 0 : activeBitmask.bitCount();
154    }
155
156    public enum AamType {
157        REMINDER(0),
158        ALERT(1),
159        ALARM(2),
160        CGM_ALERT(3),
161        MALFUNCTION(4),
162        NONE(5),
163        UNKNOWN(-1)
164        ;
165
166        private final int id;
167
168        AamType(int id) {
169            this.id = id;
170        }
171
172        public int id() {
173            return id;
174        }
175
176        public static AamType fromId(int id) {
177            for (AamType t : values()) {
178                if (t.id() == id) {
179                    return t;
180                }
181            }
182            return UNKNOWN;
183        }
184    }
185}
